data.name: Hot Strip Poker 2
data.detailed_description:
NSFW Strip Poker game. Strip Poker is a variant of poker where the losers have to remove items of clothing. The rules are based on Five card draw poker which is probably the easiest to learn and fastest to play version of poker.

Twelve attractive ladies of varying skill levels to defeat, unlocking sex scenes as a reward.

Can you defeat them all, taking all their clothes and more?

Maybe you'll get lucky tonight!

The rules are based on Five card draw poker which is probably the easiest to learn and play. Twelve attractive ladies of varying skill levels to defeat, unlocking sex scenes as a reward.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or later
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 530 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
